description.ko: 질서와 혼돈이 만나는 수학적 붕괴를 다루며, 어두운 흑요석 구조가 디지털 글리치를 통해 임상적인 하얀 공허 속으로 파편화되는 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A mathematical collapse where order meets chaos, featuring a dark obsidian structure fragmenting into a clinical white void through digital glitches.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Cubic Singularity.' A #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract captured mid-shatter, exploding into a precision vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp geometric shards against a clinical #FFFFFF void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration intersect the polygonal planes. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian surfaces. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution.
